Painbringer  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 23
DMG: 7 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Word of Pain (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 35
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 23
DMG: 7 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL

Page Updated:Wed Apr 22nd, 2020

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 38

This item is found on creatures.

Nagafen's Lair
NPC Name
a kobold champion - Nagafen's Lair
The Fabled Kobold Champion

This item is used in quests.

Quest Name
Rogue Epic: Ragebringer

Uploaded December 29th, 2020 by MoonfireAurellio
Send a correction
Post Comment
Drop Info? Does this drop anymore? Please help!
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2025 at 11:44 AM Rating: Decent
Zombie1337
3 posts
I recently started my rogues 1.0 to see if I have the mettle to do it, I saw that some of the items are pre-farmable and went about camping them. I had mostly no trouble getting the first few and the giant zweihander took me about 5 days of off and on camping with my druid to get but this thing seems to not exist. I mean every single time I kill the guardian he has the shield of the slain unicorn and that's it. I have been killing the king and all the royals too with no luck, does it drop from the king as well or am I wasting my time? I'm 125 at the time of writing this so it's not hard I just want to know where the *** is this thing?! 7 days give me a break jesus... I've played EQ since mid 1999 and I know some quests have bottleneck stuff but this is getting out of hand. I've never done the rogue 1.0 but this is already annoying the *** out of me. Any info will help thanks!
▲ Page top
wields it
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2014 at 11:00 AM Rating: Good
Shuraz
Sage
1,086 posts
when it has it. took 6 kills before I got one.
▲ Page top
a use..
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2004 at 9:41 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592760803480
View User Forum
277 posts
Good if you are DS Pling someone by mass, there are like 11 mobs being beaten up by DS and you gotta do atleast 1hp of your own dmg to them... how? easy! AOE spell :)

# Sep 22 2001 at 2:49 PM Rating: Decent

12 posts
Oh, that was humor...
▲ Page top
RE: Ack!
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2001 at 2:46 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757313782
12 posts
Probably shouldn't use this if you're in a group in a crowded dungeon where crowd control is a must. Thus, don't use with an enchanter/enchantress who might be mezzing, because the AoE will break mez, and you will be blamed for group death, and not invited anywhere ever again, and your sex life will go down the tubes.
▲ Page top
RE: Ack!
QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2001 at 6:59 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I should hope EQ and his Sex Life are as far apart as Linda Tripp is from having one, cuz if not, I think maybe he should consider leaving Online Games for a while......
▲ Page top
Certain Applications
QuoteReply
# May 20 2001 at 2:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760622026
5 posts
Proc=Taunt.


If Im in a group with no enchanter (rare but it happens) I like this for multi pulls. The AE is nice and nothing ticks a mob off more than a proccing weapon. DO NOT USE WITH AN ENCHANTER! Cant stress that enough. But once again, in SolB I got it and used it. Worked great with no enchanter. Kept the aggro, clerics and wizzies were happy. But once again, DO NOT USE IT WITH AN ENCHANTER. heh. Well, I keep it in my bag for odd occasions. Never put a weapon down till you find new ways to use it.
▲ Page top
Chanter
QuoteReply
# May 19 2001 at 1:16 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Ya i know this has already been said but ill say it reasonably so all these newbies Dont come on here asking the obvious

Magical Item
No Drop
Lore Item

ok no more questions...

7/23 1hs

Procs: Word of Pain- lvl35 AoE35dd

Dont use this around Enchanters...ok? it unmezzes and they @#$% their pants, over....
▲ Page top
worthless weapon
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2001 at 1:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361121027
9 posts

this weapon is pretty much useless. at the higher lvls im always figthgin wiht a chanter and the AOE will un mez the creatures so you cant use this weapon when theres a chanter in teh group. I would suggest stickign wiht the wurmy and yak combo.
▲ Page top
RE: worthless weapon
QuoteReply
# May 09 2001 at 2:48 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
not totally worthless. rogues can turn it in with three other weapons to receive an item for their epic quest.

oh...and i suppose a very very bored warrior could use it in a newbie zone to collect bat wings or something. i'd immediately backstab any warrior foolish enough to use this in any moderately dangerous place. =)

.annaxa purrcat, lvl49 rogue-girl
▲ Page top
RE: worthless weapon
QuoteReply
# Jan 26 2002 at 5:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753934230
215 posts
Actually, I've found another use for this weapon: AE groups in Sebilis. I use this and a Sword of Skyfire to add to the mayhem the casters create when they're dropping Pillar of Fire and the like. It's miniscule compared to them, but it still helps me keep aggro where it belongs: on me, not them. :)

its a lvl 9 cleric spell word of pain. the range for the proc sucks so you can use this in a group with a chanter aslong as you know what you are doing.I can get it to where i space the mobs so i may use the weapon, proc only on my target and not break mez so chanters don't have a anurismim.
btw i think it proc's at lower lvl but have no clue
